card.name: Volunteer Firewatch
card.text: Vigilance Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Startouched Reverend
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. {1}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Mire Pathforger
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Vigilance This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if {C} was spent to cast it.

card.name: Pedigree Collector
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Dog creature token. Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, target attacking creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Rockpile Brutes
card.text: {2}{W}, {T}: Tap target creature. If {C} was spent to activate this ability, put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Sky Force Admiral
card.text: This creature has first strike as long as it's your turn. This creature has flying as long as you control an artifact.

card.name: Mournful Matriarch
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Zaila's Willbender
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When this creature enters, exile up to one target nonland permanent with mana value 2 or less until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Opalwing Cavalry
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks with one or more artifacts, other attacking creatures get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Flagship Auto-Enforcer
card.text: First strike Whenever you cast an artifact spell, this creature gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Timely Intervention
card.text: Timely Intervention deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If {C} was spent to cast this spell, destroy that creature instead.

card.name: Aerial Augmentation
card.text: Untap target creature. It gets +2/+2 and gains flying until end of turn. If it's an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Zeppelin Disaster
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target artifact or enchantment. • Fragment target creature you control with mana value 3 or less. (Its controller creates a token that's a copy of it and puts a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Personal Wingsuit
card.text: When this Equipment enters, draw a card. Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Gloompool Heron // Into the Mist
card.text:
Flying
---
Draw three cards. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Diviner of Relics
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Spend this mana only to cast a colorless spell or activate an ability of a colorless permanent.

card.name: Task Force Operatives
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Startouched Analyst
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card. {1}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Frossenhold Walker
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature gets -6/-0 until your next turn. If {C} was spent to cast this spell, draw a card.

card.name: Mastbreaker
card.text: This creature can't be blocked as long as the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Eldritch Rebuttal
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If {C} was spent to cast this spell, counter that spell unless its controller pays {3} instead.

card.name: Innovation Thief
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, the next noncreature spell you cast this turn costs {1} less to cast.

card.name: Collaborate
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Taken by the Storm
card.text: Target nonland permanent's owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library if it's a creature or if the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Public Exhibition
card.text: Enchant creature or artifact Enchanted permanent is a colorless Clue artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card." It loses all other types and abilities.

card.name: Writheform
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature has base power and toughness 4/4 and gains hexproof and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card."

card.name: Black Site Asylum
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put two stun counters on it. {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Lamplighter of the End
card.text: Haste Whenever the void calls, if this creature has no counters on it, put a +1/+1 counter on it. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Luxuries Merchant
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Unwelcome Tenant
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When this creature dies, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Cruel Patrician
card.text: Lifelink Whenever this creature or another creature you control enters for the first time each turn, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Inkrealm Stalker
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 1. This creature gets +1/+0 and has flying as long as the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Marshwreck Gang
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice a creature or discard a card. If you do, defending player loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Speakeasy Brokers
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, choose one. If you sacrificed a creature this turn, instead choose one or more — • Destroy target creature that was dealt damage this turn. • Create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Soultaker Idol
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Flying {1}{B}, Discard this card: Create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Startouched Acolyte
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. {2}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Croak
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you've sacrificed a creature this turn. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Harrowing Transformation
card.text: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn. Then you may pay {1}. If you do, fragment it. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Learn From Loss
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Surveil 1, then draw two cards. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Compelled to Die
card.text: Target player sacrifices a nontoken creature and loses 2 life.

card.name: Nightgrasp
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -2/-2. If the void called this turn, enchanted creature instead gets -6/-6. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Eldrazi Scion SGP
card.text: Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}.

card.name: Eyekissed Invoker
card.text: Menace {R}, Sacrifice this creature: It deals 2 damage to target player. Activate only if the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Warcurse Ruminant
card.text: Haste When this creature dies, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Steelsuit Consultant
card.text: Haste Whenever one or more artifacts you control enter, this creature deals 1 damage to target player.

card.name: Unsettling Showman
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Treasure token. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. It gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Magma Scribe
card.text: This creature has first strike as long as the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Startouched Epigone
card.text: When this creature enters, another target creaure gets +2/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. {2}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Iron Triumphant
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control two or more artifacts.

card.name: Mantle Breacher // Tear Earth
card.text:
Trample {1}{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
---
Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Crimson Gladeguard
card.text: Trample Whenever you discard a card, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Steelsoul Ignition
card.text: Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. When you do, target creature gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Commune with Silence
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards, then choose a creature target opponent controls. That creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Jettison
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to any target. Then sacrifice it. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Cutting-Edge Munitions
card.text: When this artifact enters, it deals 4 damage to any target. {1}{R}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Willbreaker Lance
card.text: When this Equipment enters, you may pay {4}. If you do, create a 4/4 colorless Golem artifact creature token and attach this Equipment to it. Equipped creature gets +3/+0 and has menace. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Wreckage Inquisitors
card.text: When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Startouched Arborist
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Game Hunters
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a creature for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: First Responders
card.text: When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") {2}, Sacrifice a token: This creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Streetway Incursion
card.text: Choose one — • Create two 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature tokens with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." • Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: World Whisperer
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When this creature enters, if you sacrificed a creature this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Overzealous Recon
card.text: Vigilance When this creature dies, create a 3/2 colorless Eldrazi creature token.

card.name: Branchbound Speaker
card.text: Vigilance Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking token and untap it.

card.name: Starbreaker Juvenile
card.text: Vigilance, reach Whenever you spend four or more mana to cast another spell, if this creature has no counters on it, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Barksplitter Colossus // Winding Roots
card.text:
Trample When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.
---
Surveil 1. You gain 3 life. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: A Hole in the Sky
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control an Eldrazi. Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying.

card.name: Eldritch Growth
card.text: Search your library for two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Untap each land named Wastes put onto the battlefield this way.

card.name: Donnybrook
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Unethical Enhancements
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. If it's a token, it also gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Ancient Carapace
card.text: Defender

card.name: Voices of the Severed
card.text: Menace Whenever you fragment a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Old Ones Envoy
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each colorless nonland permanent you control, to a maximum of three.

card.name: Rend
card.text: Fragment target creature. (Its controller creates a token that's a copy of it and puts a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Reality Wanes
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. If a card named Wastes was revealed this way, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Incursive Voidmaw // Bare Fangs
card.text:
When you cast this spell, create two 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature tokens with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."
---
Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Obsidian Reliquary
card.text: When this artifact enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") {5}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Nook Dagger
card.text: When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. That creature gains deathtouch until end of turn. Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Elden Crucible
card.text: When this artifact enters, it deals damage equal to the number of artifacts and/or creatures you control to target creature an opponent controls. {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Corrupted Hedron
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card. {7}{C}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create a 10/10 colorless Eldrazi creature token.

card.name: Harvest Tenders
card.text: Vigilance, reach

card.name: Splintering Edict
card.text: Choose one. If {C} was spent to cast this spell, instead choose any number. • You may tap or untap up to one target creature. Put a stun counter on each creature tapped this way. • Counter target spell.

card.name: Psychic Rupture
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. Exile that card. If the void called this turn, surveil 2. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Obsessive Ritualist
card.text: When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. As long as the void called this turn, this creature gets +1/+1 and has deathtouch and haste. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Restless Summoners
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any type. (The types of mana are {C}, {W}, {U}, {B}, {R}, and {G}.) Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 6 or greater, untap this creature.

card.name: Oathbound Stalwart
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, you may pay {G}{W}. If you do, create a 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Discerning Patron
card.text: When this creature enters, you may pay X life, where X is its power. If you do, scry X, then draw X cards. {W}{B}: Fragment this creature. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Inspiring Orrery
card.text: When this artifact enters, it deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life. Whenever you cast another artifact spell, this artifact becomes a 3/3 artifact creature with haste until end of turn.

card.name: Sludge Trawlers
card.text: Trample Whenever you sacrifice a creature for the first time each turn, you draw a card and lose 1 life. Whenever you sacrifice a creature for the second time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.

card.name: Spirewisp Wanderer
card.text: Flying, haste At the beginning of your end step, you may discard a card. If you do, choose up to two— • Draw a card if a creature you control attacked this turn. • Draw a card if you cast a noncreature spell this turn.

card.name: Lantha, Task Force Sergeant
card.text: Activated abilities of artifacts you control cost {1} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the amount of mana you pay to activate an ability to less than one mana. {2}, {T}: Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Aviary Whisperer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {2}{U}, Discard this card: Counter target noncreature spell.

card.name: Black Site Enhancer
card.text: Vigilance Colorless spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Voidwing Kite
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your draw step, draw a card, then discard a card. You lose 1 life.

card.name: Malformed Initiate
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may {BR} and discard a card. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and it gains menace until end of turn. When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Voice of the Roaring Wind
card.text: Trample Creature spells you control with mana value 4 or greater can't be countered. {5}{R}{G}: Until end of turn, each creature you control gains trample and haste and gets +X/+X, where X is its power.

card.name: In Strength Entwined
card.text: Creature tokens you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Karsten, the Spinner
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Whenever Karsten deals combat damage to a player, exile up to one other target creature you control. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Tormented Eulogist
card.text: Haste This creature gets +2/+0 as long as you've cast a noncreature spell this turn. This creature has trample as long as you've spent six or more mana to cast spells this turn.

card.name: Ravaged Eviscerator
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." {1}{C}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Artillery Commander
card.text: Vigilance, haste

card.name: Concerning Discoveries
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you may sacrifice a Clue. If you do, draw a card. Otherwise, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Once each turn, when you sacrifice a Clue, you may tap or untap target permanent.

card.name: Sky Force Retiree
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 as long as a token you control entered this turn. Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, it gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Scape Surveyor
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic Plains card or a land card named Wastes, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Highforged Overseer
card.text: Vigilance Whenever another nontoken artifact you control enters, you may pay {1}. When you do, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Thousand-Mind Cutthroat
card.text: Double strike When this creature enters, if it's a token, put two +1/+1 counters on it. {4}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: North District Prior
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each other creature you control. {1}{W}, {T}: Exile this creature. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Cabaret Seductress
card.text: Lifelink This creature gets +1/+1 as long as a creature you control with power 2 or less entered this turn.

card.name: Stylla, Opulence Paragon
card.text: Once each turn, when another creature you control enters, create a tapped Treasure token. If that creature has power 2 or less, untap that token.

card.name: Frontline Cavalier
card.text: Vigilance Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: West District Chassis
card.text: When this Equipment enters, you may pay {2}. If you do, create a 1/1 white Human creature token and attach this Equipment to it. Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control and has flying. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Industry Kingpins
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Exile target creature with power 4 or greater. Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. • Create two 2/2 white and black Human Bard creature tokens.

card.name: Never Seen Again
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Induced Catatonia
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gains indestructible and "Whenever a creature deals damage to this creature, tap that creature and put a stun counter on it."

card.name: Faculty of Engineering
card.text: When this artifact enters, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal an artifact card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Creatures you control have vigilance.

card.name: Null Emissary // Catatonia
card.text:
Vigilance Creatures that are one or more colors enter tapped.
---
Tap up to one target creature. Draw a card. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Watchman of the Deep
card.text: Defender As long as the void called this turn, this creature gets +3/+0 and can attack as though it didn't have defender. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) {1}{U}: Surveil 1.

card.name: Inspired Retrofitter
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, draw a card, then discard a card. At the beginning of each end step, if you've cast a noncreature spell this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and untap it.

card.name: Port Inspector
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Ego Devourer
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it has this card's abilities. {U}{U}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Adaptive Lieutenant
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, this creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Void Empyrean // Spurn Reality
card.text:
Flying When you cast this spell, return target creature you don't control to its owner's hand, then surveil 3.
---
Return target creature with mana value 3 or less to its owner's hand. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: In the Nick of Time
card.text: Counter target spell. If that spell targets one or more permanents you control, draw a card.

card.name: Fade
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Piece It Together
card.text: Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") You may cast a spell with mana value less than or equal to the number of Clues you control from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Ancestral Voidstone
card.text: When this artifact enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Surveil 1.

card.name: Deepwater Whispers
card.text: Create an X/4 blue Jellyfish Horror creature token with flying, where X is the number of creatures you control with a Mythos plus the number of instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Ego Death
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control.

card.name: Wiped Clean
card.text: Flash Enchant nonland permanent When this Aura enters, if {C} was spent to cast it, counter all activated and triggered abilities of enchanted permanent. Enchanted permanent loses all abilities.

card.name: Eavesdrop
card.text: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Draw a card.

card.name: Shingle Crawler
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, each player discards a card. {2}{B}, Discard this card: Target opponent discards two cards. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Viscera Channeler
card.text: Whenever an Eldrazi you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {3}{G}, {T}: Mill X cards, where X is this creature's power. You may put a creature card from among the cards milled this way into your hand.

card.name: Holism Seeker
card.text: When this creature enters, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment. {3}{C}, {T}: Fragment this creature. (Create a 1/1 token copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Yestergrove Relic
card.text: When this creature enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever you draw your second card each turn, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Impact Surveyors
card.text: When this creature enters, create a token that's a copy of target token you control. {2}, Sacrifice an artifact or creature: Create a 3/2 colorless Eldrazi Horror creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Botanical Conference
card.text: Vigilance, ward {1} Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature you control. Then if attacking creatures you control have total power 8 or greater, draw a card.

card.name: Manifold Chorus
card.text: Trample This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature. When you do, this creature fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Savage Broodmother
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Willowvine Sentinel
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control with mana value 4 or greater. Trample, reach

card.name: Bitten By the Void
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. • Create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."

card.name: Occupation
card.text: Gain control of target artifact or creature until end of turn and untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. If it's not a creature, until end of turn, it becomes a creature with power and toughness equal to its mana value.

card.name: Blinding Immolation
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) Blinding Immolation deals 5 damage to target creature.

card.name: For All of Calloran
card.text: Creatures you control get +3/+3 until end of turn. Creature tokens you control also gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Confidential Science
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card. Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4 or greater, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Cataclysm Constable
card.text: Vigilance Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Undercity Prole
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a creature you control with power 2 or less attacks, it gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Festering Eyemass
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) {B}, Sacrifice another artifact or creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. When this creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life for each counter on it.

card.name: Flesh Shredder
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature or discard a card. If you do, this creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. Menace

card.name: Corpse Inspectors
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, mill three cards, then choose one — • Return a creature card milled this way to your hand. • This creature gets +1/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Epitaph Lurkers
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." Whenever a creature you control with power 2 or less dies, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Brethren Priestess
card.text: Menace Whenever a creature you control dies for the first time each turn, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Flamerush
card.text: This spell costs {1} more to cast for each target beyond the first. Flamerush deals 3 damage divided as you choose among one or more target creatures.

card.name: Quick and Painful
card.text: Destroy target creature. If an artifact was destroyed this way, its controller discards a card.

card.name: Ancient Stirrings
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a colorless card from among them and put it into your hand. Then put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Formless Scape
card.text: Enchant land When this Aura enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {C}.

card.name: For the Cause
card.text: As long as it's your turn, creatures you control get +1/+0. Once each turn, when an attacking creature you control dies, you may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Glorious Elegy
card.text: Sacrifice up to one nontoken creature you control. At the beginning of your next end step, return it or another creature card with lesser mana value from your graveyard to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Ashen Ravager
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature if the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) When this creature dies, if its power is 3 or greater, it deals 3 damage to target player.

card.name: Mutation Investigator
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. {1}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature with mana value 4 or greater. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Preemption Engineer
card.text: This creature has first strike as long as it's attacking. At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may tap this creature. If you do, target artifact creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Sacrifice Archivist
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may play cards exiled with this creature as long as the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Wildfire Aven
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature enters or deals combat damage to a player, if you control a creature with power 5 or greater, discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards. {R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Forgotten Fableweaver // Reprise
card.text:
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Create a tapped Treasure token.
---
Copy target instant or sorcery spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

prop.type: Creature — Human Bard Horror // Instant — Mythos

card.name: Pinefell Terror
card.text: Reach, trample, haste {1}{R}, Discard this card: Put a reach counter, a trample counter, or a haste counter on up to one target creature. This card deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Stonebridge Ambush
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, destroy up to one target creature with power 3 or less.

card.name: Blood Soliloquy
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or discard a card. Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn.

card.name: In Eldritch Flame
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Until end of turn, if a creature an opponent controls would die, exile it instead. In Eldritch Flame deals 2 damage to each creature.

card.name: North Salcman Vigil
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. {1}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: You draw a card and lose 1 life. Activate only if the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Unnatural Torment
card.text: All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. If mana produced by sacrificing a creature was spent to cast this spell, instead up to six target creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Channel the Dark
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each opponent loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a creature. Then target player discards a card. Whenever you discard a card, you may pay {1}{B}. If you do, return that card and this enchantment to your hand.

card.name: Scape Render // Christen in Fire
card.text:
Trample Whenever you cast this spell or spend six or more mana to cast another spell, this card deals 2 damage to target player.
---
Christen in Fire deals X damage to any target. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Titan's Effigy // Realmbreak
card.text:
When you cast this spell, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."
---
Create a 10/10 colorless Eldrazi creature token. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Three-Eye Observer
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Endward Harbinger
card.text: Flying, lifelink Other colorless creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Inkrealm Drowner
card.text: When you cast this spell, tap all creatures target player controls. Put a stun counter on each of up to two of those creatures. Trample

card.name: Eternity Takes
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {2} or behold a creature with mana value 6 or greater. (Choose a creature you control with mana value 6 or greater or reveal a creature card with mana value 6 or greater from your hand.) Exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Moonstone Splinter
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a Mythos spell.

card.name: Fateblur Cloak
Impure Creation
card.text: Menace This creature attacks each combat if able.

card.name: Hall of Innovation
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}: Target artifact creature you control can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Promising Vista
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you do, add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Vintage Fanatic
card.text: When this creature enters, you may return another target creature you control to its owner's hand. Once each turn, when a creature you control with power 2 or less enters, you may draw a card.

card.name: Ulamog, the Earth Engulfed
card.text: Indestructible Whenever Ulamog attacks, search target opponent's graveyard, hand, and library for up to seven cards and exile them. That player shuffles their library.

card.name: Zaila, Her Will Be Done
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, you may fragment it. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.) [+1]: Draw a card. Add {C}{C}. [-2]: Zaila deals damage to target creature equal to the number of creatures you control. [-7]: Exile any number of creatures you control, then return them to the battlefield under your control. You get an emblem with "Creatures you control are 4/4 Eldrazi Angels with flying."

card.name: Ruinate
card.text: Destroy all noncreature, nonland permanents with mana value 3 or less.

card.name: Stelver, the Eyes and Ears
card.text: Flash When Stelver enters, investigate twice. For each player, you may return a creature that player controls to its owner's hand. (To investigate, create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Sacrifice a Clue: Until end of turn, you may cast creature spells as though they had flash.

card.name: Bear Witness
card.text: Fragment all creatures. (To fragment a creature, its controller creates a token that's a copy of it and puts a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Zaila's Arbiter // Eerie Stillness
card.text:
Flash Flying When you cast this spell, exile up to one target nonland permanent. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it for {2} rather than its mana cost.
---
Until your next turn, spells cost {2} more to cast. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: High Sergeant Liano
card.text: When Liano enters, create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens. Coalition — Whenever Liano attacks with one or more tokens, draw a card.

card.name: Grand Triarch
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When you cast this spell, copy it for each {C}{C} spent to cast it. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.) Flying, protection from all colors

card.name: Evelline, Ark of Salvation
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever Evelline enters or attacks, return target artifact or creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. If it's a creature and Evelline is attacking, it enters tapped and attacking with a flying counter on it. Crew 3

card.name: Destined End
card.text: Until end of turn, abilities don't trigger. Destroy all nonland permanents.

card.name: Wharf Inspector
card.text: Vigilance As this creature enters, choose a noncreature card type. Spells of the chosen type cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: Devonia, Lost Ministrix
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When Devonia enters, mill two cards. Once each turn, when the void calls, you may exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard and cast a copy of it. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Jaded Coroners
card.text: When this creature enters, investigate. Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {1}{U}: Fragment this creature. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Scion of Insanity
Inkrealm Guardian // All Collapses
card.text:
Trample, ward {2} Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw two cards.
---
Creatures you control can't be blocked this turn. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Roiling Undertow
card.text: Choose one — • Return all creatures with counters on them to their owner's hands. • Return all creatures without counters on them to their owner's hands.

card.name: Friede, Weave Dancer
Haunted Starlet
card.text: Lifelink Whenever another creature with power 2 or less enters for the first time each turn, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." You lose 1 life.

card.name: Insatiate Slasher
card.text: Menace You may cast this card from your graveyard as long as the void called this turn. If you do, it enters with a haste counter on it. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Strike Suppressor
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn. Whenever an opponent creates one or more creature tokens, that player loses that much life and you gain that much life.

card.name: Fathomless Invocations
card.text: Starting with you and until all modes have been chosen, each player chooses one that hasn't been chosen — • That player loses 7 life. • That player discards their hand. • That player exiles all but the bottom six cards of their library. • Each of that player's opponents creates a 10/10 colorless Eldrazi creature token.

card.name: Emrakul's Nullscribe // Ablate
card.text:
Menace This creature gets +2/+2 for each player with one or fewer cards in hand.
---
Target opponent exiles two cards from their hand. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Esme, Lost to Avarice
card.text: Once each turn, when the void calls, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) {3}{B}{B}: If there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, Esme gains flying and becomes a 7/7 Horror in addition to her other types. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ichor Winnower
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Haste Whenever you spend an odd amount of mana to cast a spell, this creature deals 1 damage to target player.

card.name: Collector of Souls
card.text: This creature can't be blocked except by three or more creatures. Whenever this creature becomes blocked by a creature with toughness 2 or less, gain control of that creature. (It's no longer in combat.)

card.name: Bullet Locomotive
card.text: This Vehicle has haste and is an artifact creature as long as it entered this turn. {R}{R}: Until end of turn, this Vehicle becomes an artifact creature, gets +2/+0, and gains trample and "Sacrifice this Vehicle at end of combat." Crew 1

card.name: Bender of Will // Unending Pain
card.text:
Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}."
---
Target creature gains double strike until end of turn. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Careening Steam Engine
card.text: When this artifact enters, it deals 1 damage to each creature you don't control. At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Deathscorn Aspect
card.text: Trample, haste When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this creature unless the void called this turn. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)

card.name: Gene Recombinators
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice two creatures: Create an X/X green Ooze creature token, where X is the total power of the sacrificed creatures. Activate only as a sorcery. Coalition — Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, populate. (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card.name: Curious Botanist
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, choose one. • Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") • You may play an additional land this turn. • You gain 3 life.

card.name: Starbreaker Ghost // Pierce Infinity
card.text:
Trample Whenever you spend six or more mana to cast another spell, create a 3/2 colorless Eldrazi creature token.
---
Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Chasm Behemoth
card.text: Vigilance, trample Ward—Sacrifice a noncreature permanent.

card.name: Herald of the Expanse
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) This creature and other creatures you control get +2/+2. {5}{G}{G}: Fragment this creature. (Create a token that's a copy of it and put a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.)

card.name: Kavalesk, the Dark Exalted // Glimpse the Eye
card.text:
You may cast spells from your graveyard as long as they were put there from your hand or library this turn. Spells you cast this way cost {1} less to cast.
---
Discard up to three cards, then draw that many cards. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Spirit Horror // Sorcery — Mythos

card.name: Grand Awakening
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary and has haste and "Sacrifice this creature at the beginning of the next end step."

card.name: Population Boom
card.text: If one or more tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead. {4}{G}{W}: Until end of turn, creatures you control have base power and toughness equal to the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Olmin, Royal Liaison
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Spells your opponents cast that are one or more colors cost {1} more to cast. Whenever you cast a colorless spell, scry 1. Until end of turn, you may look at the top card of your library, and you may cast spells from the top of your library.

card.name: Clanston Innovator
card.text: Haste Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Artifact creatures you control have haste and prowess. (Multiple instances of prowess trigger separately.)

card.name: Something in the Soil
card.text: You get a soil counter. Then mill X cards, where X is twice the number of soil counters you have. When you do, you may return a permanent card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. A deck can have any number of cards named Something in the Soil.

card.name: Elisa, Hand of Torvinald
card.text: Haste When Elisa enters, put two +1/+1 counters, a flying counter, and a lifelink counter on target artifact you control. You may have it become a 0/0 artifact creature. (This effect lasts indefinitely.) {2}{R}{W}, Tap two untapped artifacts you control: Exile Elisa, then return her to the battlefield under her owner's control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Efraim, High Alderman
card.text: Extort (Whenever you cast a spell, you may pay {WB}. If you do, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain that much life.) At the beginning of your end step, if you gained 3 or more life this turn, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter and an extort counter on it.

card.name: Essence Ripper
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top two cards of each player's library face down. You may look at them for as long as they remain exiled. Discard a card: Until end of turn, you may play target card exiled with this creature. You may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast spells this way.

card.name: Starblood Tides
card.text: Each player discards their hand, then draws cards equal to the greatest number of cards a player discarded this way. If you discarded more cards than an opponent this way, create a 3/2 colorless Eldrazi creature token.

card.name: Brunn, Blunt Tactician
card.text: Vigilance, haste Whenever Brunn attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on him. Then if he's attacking with three or more other creatures, attacking creatures get +1/+0 until end of turn. Then if he's attacking with six or more other creatures, Brunn deals damage to target player equal to his power.

card.name: Skittering Swarmlord
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." Sacrifice a Scion: Add one mana of any color. {3}, Sacrifice a Scion: Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Lore Interwoven
card.text: When this enchantment enters, if you cast it, untap up to three lands. Creature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each noncreature spell you've cast this turn. Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each creature spell you've cast this turn.

card.name: Graven Confidant
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your upkeep, mill a card, then you may pay life equal to its mana value. If you do, put it into your hand.

card.name: Lostlands Oracle
card.text: Flying If you would create one or more tokens, draw that many cards instead. Do this only three times each turn.

card.name: Mystic Gate
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {WU}, {T}: Add {W}{W}, {W}{U}, or {U}{U}.

card.name: Sunken Ruins
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {UB}, {T}: Add {U}{U}, {U}{B}, or {B}{B}.

card.name: Graven Cairns
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {BR}, {T}: Add {B}{B}, {B}{R}, or {R}{R}.

card.name: Fire-Lit Thicket
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {RG}, {T}: Add {R}{R}, {R}{G}, or {G}{G}.

card.name: Wooded Bastion
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {GW}, {T}: Add {G}{G}, {G}{W}, or {W}{W}.

card.name: Reality Cusp
card.text: As this land enters, you may choose two colors. If you do, it enters tapped and you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {C} or one mana of either of the chosen colors.

card.name: Lost to Endless Scripture
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. Take an extra turn after this one. Exile Lost to Endless Scripture.

card.name: Fetid Heath
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {WB}, {T}: Add {W}{W}, {W}{B}, or {B}{B}.

card.name: Cascade Bluffs
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {UR}, {T}: Add {U}{U}, {U}{R}, or {R}{R}.

card.name: Twilight Mire
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {BG}, {T}: Add {B}{B}, {B}{G}, or {G}{G}.

card.name: Rugged Prairie
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {RW}, {T}: Add {R}{R}, {R}{W}, or {W}{W}.

card.name: Flooded Grove
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {GU}, {T}: Add {G}{G}, {G}{U}, or {U}{U}.

card.name: Thoughtscraper
card.text: As this creature enters, choose a card name. Triggered abilities of sources with the chosen name don't trigger. (A triggered ability uses the words "when," "whenever," or "at.")

card.name: Aspirant of Ulamog
card.text: When this creature enters, exile up to one other target nonland permanent until this creature leaves the battlefield. {4}: Destroy this creature. Its controller draws two cards. Any player may activate this ability.

card.name: Living Apogee // Drown the Sky
card.text:
At the beginning of combat on your turn, this creature's power and toughness becomes equal to the total power of Eldrazi you control not named Living Apogee. (This lasts indefinitely.)
---
Create a 4/4 colorless Eldrazi Angel creature token with flying. (Cast this from your hand or a copy from the battlefield once.)

card.name: Children of the Heralds
card.text: Whenever you cast this spell or another colorless spell, you may put a colorless permanent card with lesser mana value from your hand onto the battlefield. Eldrazi you control get +1/+1 for each other Eldrazi you control.

card.name: Supreme Desecrator
card.text: Trample Lands your opponents control have "{T}: Add {C}" and "Whenever this land is tapped to add mana other than {C}, its controller loses 3 life."

card.name: Scourge of Aeons
card.text: Flying, trample This creature enters with three doom counters on it. At the beginning of your end step, remove a doom counter from this creature. If you do, destroy all other nonland permanents with mana value greater than or equal to the number of doom counters on it.

card.name: West District Hangar
card.text: When this artifact enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control." Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Artifact creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Eldrazi Monolith
card.text: When this artifact enters, fragment up to one target creature and draw a card. (Its controller creates a token that's a copy of it and puts a splinter counter on both. Creatures with splinter counters are 1/1 and can't be fragmented.) Colorless spells you cast cost {2} less to cast.

card.name: Lantha's Journal
card.text: {2}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. Put a page counter on Lantha's Journal. {2}, {T}, Remove X page counters from Lantha's Journal: You may cast target card with mana value X or less from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Leonard, Experiment Zero
card.text: When Leonard enters, create a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token with "Sacrifice this creature: Add {C}." Coalition — Whenever Leonard attacks with one or more tokens, you may have all attacking tokens become copies of target nonlegendary creature until end of turn.

card.name: Skyshaper
card.text: Flash Flying, lifelink This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature enters, exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Lightwire Swarm
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, if you've drawn two or more cards this turn, create a 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature token with flying. If you've drawn three or more cards this turn, create a token that's a copy of this creature instead.

card.name: Salar, Calloran's Defiance
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your second main phase, if you've spent six or more mana this turn, untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there's an additional combat phase.

card.name: Ravin, Heir of Goldport
card.text: Vigilance, trample Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 2 life. Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Fated Reunion
card.text: Reveal the top six cards of your library. Put a creature card from among them into your hand. If that card has mana value 3 or less and shares a mana value with a creature you control, put it onto the battlefield instead.

card.name: Torvinald, Iron Eminence
card.text: Vigilance, ward {2} At the beginning of your upkeep, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Greytide Specter
Bloodlust Visionary
card.text: If sacrificing a creature you control or a creature you control dying due to being sacrificed causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time. {B}{B}, Sacrifice another creature: You draw two cards and lose 2 life.

card.name: A World Worth Fighting For
card.text: Whenever you cast your first noncreature spell each turn, put a heart counter on this enchantment. Do the same for creature spells and soul counters. Remove a heart counter and a soul counter from this enchantment: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.

card.name: Jerald, Steel Virtuoso
card.text: When Jerald enters, create a 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature token with flying. {1}{R}: Artifact creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. {3}{R}{R}: Artifact creatures you control gain double strike and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Eccentric Geneticist
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control another creature with mana value 2 or greater. This creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance as long as you control another creature with mana value 4 or greater. This creature gets +1/+1 and has trample as long as you control another creature with mana value 6 or greater.

card.name: Baalakus, the Zenith
card.text: Vigilance, trample When Baalakus enters, draw X cards, where X is the greatest power among other creatures you control. If X is 8 or more, instead draw twice that many cards and you have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game.

card.name: Kozilek, the Bonds Unmade
card.text: Ward—Discard two cards. Your maximum hand size is twelve. Whenever you cast this spell or Kozilek attacks, if you have seven or fewer cards in your hand, draw five cards and add five {C}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Emrakul, the Sky Sundered
card.text: When you cast this spell, choose beginning phase, main phase, or combat phase. Until your next turn, each opponent skips each instance of each phase not chosen this way. (The beginning phase includes the untap, upkeep, and draw steps. That player doesn't skip the ending phase.) Flying, trample, protection from mana value 3 or less

card.name: Keeper's Peninsula
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {W}, or {U}.

card.name: Dusk Vantage
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {U}, or {B}.

card.name: Lost Settlement
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {B}, or {R}.

card.name: Cliffrest Tributary
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {R}, or {G}.

card.name: Village Steeples
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {G}, or {W}.

card.name: Secluded Avenue
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {W}, or {B}.

card.name: Cataract Valley
card.text: This land enters tapped.[b] [/b]{T}: Add {C}, {U}, or {R}.

card.name: Outlands Hamlet
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {B}, or {G}.

card.name: Bronzeglade Peaks
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {R}, or {W}.

card.name: Lakewatch Ruins
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}, {G}, or {U}.

card.name: Treasure SGP
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Forge in Anguish
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card or pay {2}. Target creature you control gets +3/+1 and gains first strike and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Clue SGP
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: What Remains of Frossenhold
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {5}: Until end of turn, this land becomes a 4/4 Eldrazi creature. (It's still a land.) Whenever this land attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it and draw a card.

card.name: Eldrazi Angel SGP
card.text: Flying

card.name: Thopter SGP
card.text: Flying

card.name: In Strength Entwined_Promo
card.text: Creature tokens you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Gene Recombinators_Promo
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice two creatures: Create an X/X green Ooze creature token, where X is the total power of the sacrificed creatures. Activate only as a sorcery. Coalition – Whenever this creature attacks with one or more tokens, populate. (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card.name: Rend_Promo
card.text: Fragment target creature.

card.name: Grand Awakening_Promo
card.text: Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary and has haste and "Sacrifice this creature at the beginning of the next end step."

card.name: Bear Witness_Promo
card.text: Fragment all creatures.

card.name: Bird SGP
card.text: Flying

card.name: Jellyfish Horror SGP
card.text: Flying

card.name: Esme, Lost to Avarice
card.text: Once each turn, when the void calls, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.) {3}{B}{B}: If there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, Esme gains flying and becomes a 7/7 Horror in addition to her other types. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Construct SGP
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.

card.name: Darkwood Guerillas
card.text: First strike When this creature enters, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of artifacts you control. Exile up to two of them and put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Whenever this creature attacks, you may play a card exiled with it until end of turn.

card.name: Exander, Half-Forgotten
card.text: Menace Once each turn, when the void calls, you may put a +1/+1 counter on Exander. Then if his power is 5 or greater, each opponent discards a card. (The void calls on your turn when a card enters your graveyard from your hand or library.)
